products.name: CIVIC 3 SEATER SOFA 111/6033
products.description: Civic 3 Seater Sofa is a masterfully engineered seating solution designed to introduce high-end architectural clarity and expansive comfort to modern environments. Piece features a high-strength internal framework constructed from Solid Wood and Plywood, supported by robust architectural legs meticulously crafted from Solid Malaysian Oak in a clean White Wash finish. Upholstery is wrapped in premium Shanturp Fabric in a sophisticated Chrome tone, offering a dense, multi-tonal weave that provides a soft tactile sense of luxury and a serene atmospheric energy. Design is defined by its clean, geometric profile and generous cushioning, featuring wide integrated armrests that add disciplined texture and visual depth to the silhouette. Architectural profile ensures a grounded, authoritative presence while maintaining a light floor presence suitable for large-scale family lounges or boutique residential zones. With its substantial width and an ergonomic seat height, it offers a prestigious and supportive platform for shared relaxation and social engagement. Overall look harmonizes modern precision with authentic wood artistry, serving as a versatile centerpiece for spaces that value expert craftsmanship and architectural integrity.
